title: Tricks to not get sick: Food safety for kids (video) - Canada.ca
content:
## Tricks to Not Get Sick: Food Safety for Kids
With described video
In a colorful animated kitchen, a hand turns on a portable  speaker and turns up the volume.
Animated characters help clean, separate, cook and chill  food from a grocery bag.
I said clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chill!
When it comes to making food
You gotta know the trick
So you don’t get sick
First you gotta clean
Your veggies and your hands
Wash those germs away
They’re not in your plans.
You need to separate
Different types of food
Treat raw meat and veggies
Like they’re having a feud.
If you’re helping to cook
Make sure it’s up to the temp
Before you take a bite.
Now it’s time to chill (Uh-huh)
Pack it in the fridge
And move on with your day.
Clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chill
Clean, separate, cook and chillllllllll!
Text appears: Get more tricks, Canada dot C-A slash  food safety. Logo for the Government of Canada.
